nasb.text: and James, the son of Zebedee, and John the brother of James (to them He gave the name Boanerges, which means, “Sons of Thunder”);

esv.text: James the son of Zebedee and John the brother of James (to whom he gave the name Boanerges, that is, Sons of Thunder);

cnv.text: 西庇太的兒子雅各，和雅各的弟弟約翰，

ccb.text: 西庇太的儿子雅各和雅各的兄弟约翰——耶稣给他们取名叫“半尼其”，就是“雷霆之子”的意思、

csbs.text: 西庇太的儿子雅各， 雅各的弟弟约翰 ——耶稣给他们起名叫“波阿内格”—— 这意思是“雷霆之子”；
